name: factor-mining
description: Codex local-agent workflow for Factor Mining plugin.py upload, backtest, polling, and summaries.

interface.shortDescription: Turn public tasks or custom factor ideas into backtested plugin.py factors.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first local-agent helper for writing Factor Mining plugin.py files from public tasks or custom ideas, validating metadata statically, uploading factors, submitting backtests, polling workflow state, retrieving artifacts, and summarizing results.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Factor Mining public task list.
Use Factor Mining with my custom factor idea.
Switch Factor Mining to a different Agent API Key with the secure setup page.
Resume my Factor Mining run and summarize results.
